_description: CS-StatusMonitor stack — the UPSTREAM base image consumed via src/uptime-kuma/Dockerfile. The monitor tracks its digest and triggers a release when it moves. It MUST NOT track this repo's own published image (ghcr.io/bauer-group/cs-statusmonitor/uptime-kuma): doing so would loop — a release republishes it, its digest moves, the monitor fires again, forever.
